canonical_name: the first child of a sworn priestess
An old midwife had told her that when a pregnant woman
the best of all the knights
a knight in Troy called Hector
that same sir Ectorius who fostered our king Arthur
that same babe I bore even before I was a grown woman
a wet nurse ready at hand for yours
such of the women as were with child
the women as were with child
one who was neither gentle nor skilled with women
my true-born sons' by my queen
